title: Norwegian Cod with Chinese Stew
description: A unique fusion dish combining the flavors of Norway and China. The stew-like sauce is made with cod, silky floral notes, and a hint of Norwegian flair.
instructions: Bring the stew to a boil and reduce to a simmer.
Add the cod to the stew and cook until it flakes easily, about 8-10 minutes.
Stir in the silky and floral sauces.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the cod and stew over a bed of steamed vegetables.
